properties.displayName: Control the use of AVD for Cloud in Mission Platforms
properties.description: This policy initiative applies exclusively to Mission Platform products and services; usage outside of these scopes is not supported. This policy set deploys the required policy guardrails governing the use of Azure Virtual Desktops within the Environment. See the list of policies of the services that are included.

metadata.description: Enable or disable required RDP properties

metadata.displayName: Restrict external private endpoint host pools excluded subscriptions effect
metadata.description: Enable or disable to restrict external private endpoint host pools excluded subscriptions

metadata.displayName: Restrict external private endpoint workspaces excluded subscriptions effect
metadata.description: Enable or disable to restrict external private endpoint workspaces pools excluded subscriptions
